scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @pas/shared build && pnpm --filter @pas/clients build && pnpm --parallel --filter api --filter web dev
scripts.e2e: pnpm --filter @pas/shared build && pnpm --filter @pas/clients build && pnpm --filter @pas/e2e test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @pas/shared build && pnpm --filter @pas/clients build && pnpm -r lint
scripts.smoke: pnpm --filter api exec vitest run --config vitest.smoke.config.ts
scripts.test: pnpm test:eslint-rules && pnpm test:guards && pnpm --filter @pas/shared build && pnpm --filter @pas/clients build && pnpm --filter @pas/shared test && pnpm --filter @pas/clients test && pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter web test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pas/shared build && pnpm --filter @pas/clients build && pnpm -r typecheck
